headline: Facebook’s Creator Studio has been revived as an AI companion app
summary: Meta relaunches Facebook Creator Studio as a new AI companion app. The app aims to help creators grow their audience on Facebook. Meta's AI Creator Assistant is a central feature.

headline: The top tech Prime Day deals to shop on day two
summary: Amazon's Prime Day continues with many top tech deals still available. Day two offers new and existing discounts for Prime subscribers. Find the best tech bargains before the event ends.

headline: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
summary: Prime Day offers unprecedented discounts on Apple products. Apple Watch Series 11 and AirPods Pro 3 hit new low prices. Grab deals on wireless earbuds, smartwatches, and more.

headline: The 16 best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
summary: Prime Day features significant discounts on robot vacuums. Deals are available from Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart. Now is a prime time to purchase a highly-rated robot vacuum.

headline: Beast of Reincarnation is a Stunning Action-RPG with a Tactical Twist
summary: Pokémon developer Game Freak enters the action-RPG genre with a new title. "Beast of Reincarnation" is highlighted as a gripping new game. It features a deadly dynamic duo and tactical elements.

headline: PlayStation 5 Now Features Custom GTA 6 UI, as Sony Goes All In on Rockstar Partnership
summary: PlayStation 5 now displays a custom Grand Theft Auto 6 user interface. This is part of a major new partnership between Sony and Rockstar Games. The UI change promotes the upcoming GTA 6.

headline: GTA 6 Looks Amazing, but the 63 New Screenshots Probably Don't Represent Gameplay, Tech Experts Believe
summary: Rockstar released 63 new, highly detailed screenshots for GTA 6. Tech experts doubt the images fully represent actual gameplay. Fans eagerly await Trailer 3 for a clearer view of the game.

headline: Free Best Buy $50 Gift Card When Buying GTA 6 with an Eligible Console
summary: Best Buy offers a $50 gift card with GTA 6 console bundles. Preorder GTA 6 with an eligible PlayStation 5 or Xbox console. This deal is available today for gamers.

headline: Watch: Moment earthquakes hit airport and buildings in Caracas
summary: Video footage shows the immediate aftermath of earthquakes in Caracas. Residents frantically evacuate buildings and the airport. BBC reporters and locals captured the events on video.

headline: How to cope in a heatwave - according to you
summary: Readers share practical tips for enduring heatwave conditions. Advice covers everything from appropriate clothing to getting restful sleep. Learn community-sourced strategies for staying cool.

headline: Bodies found in 'advanced deterioration' at under-fire trust
summary: An inspection revealed "advanced deterioration" of bodies at NUH mortuaries. The Human Tissue Authority identified 10 critical shortfalls. The trust is facing scrutiny over mortuary conditions.

headline: Jail time and unlimited fines planned under conversion practices ban
summary: A new Bill proposes jail time and unlimited fines for conversion practices. The government aims to protect LGBT people from abusive acts. The legislation seeks to ban efforts to change someone's identity.
